notes: Solid, feature-complete Asteroids implementation with UFOs, hyperspace, audio, particle effects, and proper wrapping; minor issue is bullets render as tiny 2px lines rather than dots, and the ship shape is slightly unconventional, but overall very well executed.
An absolutely flawless implementation of Asteroids, complete with Web Audio synthesis for classic sound effects, perfect vector-style rendering with screen-wrap drawing, and spot-on game mechanics.

A strong and mostly complete Asteroids clone with solid controls and presentation, but it has some authenticity/gameplay issues like the lives logic effectively granting an extra ship and a few simplified collision/respawn behaviors.
